name: Spinach and Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces fresh spinach, washed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the spinach, mushrooms, chopped eggs, and crumbled bacon together in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss everything to coat the spinach evenly.
